info.title: SolutionSetup.Cli
info.description: Scaffolds .NET solutions with strong foundations and optional Clean Architecture layout.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Invoke, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Scaffold .NET solutions with strong foundations and optional Clean Architecture layout.

Examples:
  solution-setup --solutionName BookingService
  solution-setup --solutionName BookingService --layout clean --framework net10.0 --presentation api

options.name: --solutionName
options.description: Name of the solution (also used as project prefix)

options.name: --path
options.description: Target directory where the solution folder will be created. Defaults to the current directory.

options.name: --framework
options.description: Target framework for generated projects (net9.0 or net10.0).

options.name: --testFramework
options.description: Test framework to use for test projects.

options.name: --skipGlobalJson
options.description: If set, global.json will not be created.

options.name: --presentation
options.description: Presentation style for clean layout (api or mvc).

options.name: --solutionFormat
options.description: Solution format to emit (sln or slnx). Defaults to sln.

options.name: --dryRun
options.description: Show what would be generated without writing files or running dotnet commands.
